Bolt.focus: Ensure that the addition of systemd sandboxing directives does not introduce unacceptable delays or overhead during service startup.

Palette.focus: Ensure that if sandboxed services fail due to restricted privileges, the failure logs provide clear, actionable troubleshooting context.

Sentinel.focus: Audit the implementation of systemd sandboxing directives across all modified services. Verify that no services are granted unnecessary capabilities or filesystem access, strictly adhering to the principle of least privilege.
